html:
Exclusive to:

“Allows a Sawhorse equipped with it to build new things.”

-

The Moon Glass Saw Blade can be used to upgrade a Sawhorse. An upgraded Sawhorse allow players to craft Stone Furniture and Bunch o' Stone which gives 5 Cut Stones for 15 Rocks.

Trivia

  • The Moon Glass Saw Blade was introduced in the Depths of Duplicity update.
  • During the Rhymes with Play stream showcasing the update, the developers stated that the Moon Glass Saw Blade was originally intended to be crafted from Dreadstone. However, they decided against it in order to grant players earlier access to stone furniture.

Gallery

  • A Moon Glass Saw Blade next to an upgraded Sawhorse.
  • Old Moon Glass Saw Blade icon
DSTDSRoGSWHam

Moon Glass Saw Blade
"For when a regular blade just won't cut it."

Does not stack

carpentry_blade_moonglass
Exclusive to:
“Razor-sharp, like my mind!”
–Wilson
“Sharp.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang once receive nasty cut from glass.”
–Wolfgang
“Pretty. If it was smaller I'd wear it around my neck.”
–Wendy
“I LIKE IT”
–WX-78
“A moon glass saw blade. Sharp enough to cut stone.”
–Wickerbottom
“I know, Lucy. You're more versatile.”
–Woodie
“Fancy... for a laborer's tool.”
–Maxwell
“A shame it is nöt a weapön.”
–Wigfrid
“Ms. Wickerbottom said we should be extra careful with that.”
–Webber
“Will it slice le jambon?”
–Warly
“Careful, friends! Sharp!”
–Wormwood
“That is one sweet saw blade.”
–Winona
“But what does it cut?”
–Wortox
“Pretty moon cutter!”
–Wurt
“Lookin' sharp! Hehe.”
–Walter
“Well, does it saw faster?”
–Wanda
“Allows a Sawhorse equipped with it to build new things.”
-
The Moon Glass Saw Blade can be used to upgrade a Sawhorse. An upgraded Sawhorse allow players to craft Stone Furniture and Bunch o' Stone which gives 5 Cut Stones for 15 Rocks.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Moon Glass Saw Blade was introduced in the Depths of Duplicity update.
During the Rhymes with Play stream showcasing the update, the developers stated that the Moon Glass Saw Blade was originally intended to be crafted from Dreadstone. However, they decided against it in order to grant players earlier access to stone furniture.
Gallery[edit | edit source]
A Moon Glass Saw Blade next to an upgraded Sawhorse.

{{Scrapbook Info|Allows a Sawhorse equipped with it to build new things.}}
The '''Moon Glass Saw Blade''' can be used to upgrade a [[Sawhorse]]. An upgraded Sawhorse allow players to craft [[Carpentry Filter|Stone Furniture]] and [[Bunch o' Stone]] which gives 5 [[Cut Stone]]s for 15 [[Rocks]].

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Moon Glass Saw Blade was introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve Together/Version History/2024|Depths of Duplicity]]'' update.
* During the ''Rhymes with Play'' stream showcasing the update, the developers stated that the Moon Glass Saw Blade was originally intended to be crafted from [[Dreadstone]]. However, they decided against it in order to grant players earlier access to stone furniture.
